notableEvents.label: Wenceel Pérez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wenceel Pérez grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Wenceel Pérez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Rikuu Nishida out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Kyle Finnegan to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Andrew Benintendi scores. Throwing error by first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field. Drew Romo scores.
